Dependence/Minimal Assistance (Subject 75% or more), 05 = Helper - Modified Dependence/Supervision (Subject 100%), 06 = No Helper/Modified Independence (Device), 07 = No Helper/Complete Independence
78 _32A BWL_ACDNT_ADMSN_CD (32a) Bowel Frequency of Accidents: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the frequency of bowel accidents at admission. Bowel accidents refers to the act of soiling linen or clothing with stool, and includes bedpan spills. 01 = Five or more accidents in the past 7 days, 02
